name: uPI Semiconductor Corp.
summary: uPI Semiconductor Corp., an IC design company, designs and manufactures analog and mixed-signal power management solutions in electronic systems in Taiwan and internationally. It offers Power Management products, such as DC/DC buck controllers and converters, DC/DC boost converters, power device drivers, low dropout regulators, power switch ICs, LED driver ICs, charging ICs, and voltage and current consoles; Battery Management products, including PTIC and charger ICs; and low, medium, and high voltage power MOSFET products. The company also provides application and interface, ultra speed, tiny package speed, high surge, and high voltage TVS products; OP-amplifiers; bio sensors; and GaN solutions. uPI Semiconductor Corp. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.
